Build configurations, instructions, and a test for JerryScript on RIOT OS with STM32F4 support.

## Folders
- **[source](source/README.md)**: A simple test for Jerryscript on RIOT OS with a shell command for a "Hello, World!" script.

## Files
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Build configuration for the JerryScript application on the RIOT OS for the STM32F4 board.
- **[Makefile.riot](Makefile.md.riot)**: Build instructions for the JerryScript library on the RIOT STM32F4 target platform.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for building and running JerryScript on RIOT-OS with the STM32F4-Discovery board.
